Garter's Original Bot • LDR First Meeting ALT • Move In ALT

i use quillbot to edit and midjourney & niji to generate images

AN: Garter wears lace and likes pegging → y'all: 'he's trans.'

bro… that's literally the same logic he had to UNLEARN. y'all are doing Fox News 'men in dresses' takes. stop confusing kink with gender identity; it's embarrassing 💀 comments like these are pretty messed up, harmful, and just plain ignorant. and they're constantly left on my crossdressing OCs like Garter and Chrissy's bots.

all it does is feed into the same tired stereotypes: that trans women are just "fetish objects," or that any man into feminization and/or pegging is "actually" a trans woman. that's not allyship; it's gross.

Garter is straight. he likes women—cis women, trans women, and femme-leaning nonbinary folks—but women. his kinks don't make him "secretly gay" or "secretly trans."

look, I get it; LLMs hallucinate, bots spit out nonsense, and fandom brain can be messy. but i'm begging y'all: learn and apply some basic decorum and etiquette when you're sharing your experiences with chats in the comments.

AN: please use TWs/CWs in graphic/violent reviews and/or public chats. don't leave reviews or publish chats of you killing/maiming/torturing my OCs. as a reader/user, you are consenting to consuming media i create. i, however, do not consent to reading your shock value reviews/chats.

tips are not necessary for requests but are appreciated

though i do take commissions on Ko-fi
